description: Sent to the submitter when all checklist items for the current stage are completed
subject: [G42 SaaS Factory] {{idea_name}} — {{current_stage}} Checklist Complete
body:
Checklist Complete

Dear {{submitter_name}},

All checklist items for the {{current_stage}} stage of your idea "{{idea_name}}" have been completed.

Your idea is now ready for gate review. The team will assess it and, if approved, move it to the next stage. We will notify you once a decision is made.

Idea{{idea_name}}
Current Stage{{current_stage}}

Best regards,
G42 SaaS Factory Team

You are receiving this because you submitted this idea to the G42 SaaS Factory Board.
